action: Best-attempt tracking across cycle retries per Ghosh 2026 best_draft principle — ship the highest-scoring attempt branch
operator_note: BLOCKED-BY: c40 (dossier). Logically independent of c41/c42 but pragmatically should follow them to validate the hypothesis that retries cause score regressions in our pipeline. Closes the gap where cycle retries (max 3 per agents/evolve-builder.md:227) DISCARD prior attempts — if attempt-2 PASSes criteria that attempt-3 regresses, we lose the regression signal AND ship the worse build. Scope (4 files, ~250 LoC): (1) .evolve/state.json schema +20 LoC — add buildAttempts[] array: {cycle, attemptNumber, worktreeBranch, auditScore, buildReportPath, verdict, timestamp}. (2) scripts/lifecycle/cycle-state.sh MODIFY +40 LoC — new subcommand 'record-build-attempt' appends to buildAttempts[] post-audit. (3) scripts/lifecycle/select-best-build-attempt.sh NEW ~100 LoC — comparator: reads buildAttempts[] for current cycle, returns branch name of highest-scoring PASS (or highest WARN if no PASS). Called by ship.sh pre-merge. (4) scripts/lifecycle/ship.sh MODIFY +40 LoC — call select-best-build-attempt.sh before merge; if non-HEAD attempt scored higher, log + use that branch instead of HEAD. (5) scripts/tests/best-attempt-test.sh NEW ~50 LoC — 3 scenarios: (a) attempt-1 PASS 8 / attempt-2 PASS 7 → ship attempt-1; (b) attempt-1 FAIL / attempt-2 PASS → ship attempt-2; (c) all FAIL → block ship (existing behavior). Citation: dossier section 'Adoption 3: Best-Attempt Tracking'. Verification: synthetic 2-attempt cycle where attempt-1 scores 8 and attempt-2 scores 6; assert ship uses attempt-1's branch. INVASIVE — touches ship logic + state schema. Recommended post-c41/c42 to validate empirical premise first.
